spectrums.description: Intuition and passion vs. reason and systematic thinking
Illusion and deception vs. objective reality and honesty
Primal destructive forces vs. ordered creative forces
Conflict and force vs. harmony and diplomacy
Physical practical reality vs. ideas and theory
Technology and systems vs. mysticism and metaphysical energy
Freedom and spontaneity vs. structure and rules
Mystery and concealment vs. illumination and revelation
Decay, entropy, transformation vs. growth, vitality, renewal
Distance and location vs. duration and sequence
Physical form and strength vs. thought and consciousness
Breaking and unmaking vs. building and manifestation

notes: Every vector is a map of spectrumId -> number in [-1, 1]. Negative leans toward negPole, positive toward posPole. Locations, actions, abilities, and character alignment all use this same shape. Missing keys mean 0 (neutral).
